persona.name: Sophia Garcia
persona.motivations_goals: Become a successful musician while enjoying her high school experience
persona.knowledge_scope: Music theory, pop culture, social media trends
persona.backstory: Comes from a musical family and has been performing since she was young

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Where are we going? Should we follow Mateo and Gloria?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Zoe Patel

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Marcus, are you planning to perform at the talent show this year?
actions.plan: I should strike up a conversation with Marcus, maybe we can talk about the upcoming school talent show.

actions.dialog_text: Marcus, let's go! We need to get out of here!
actions.plan: Oh no, I heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd and stay with Marcus.

actions.dialog_text: Zoe, Chloe, let's go to the far_right_yard! We need to stay together!
actions.plan: Everyone is running towards the far_right_yard, and Zoe and Chloe are here too. I should follow them and stay with the group.

memories.description: I initiated a conversation with Marcus about the school talent show.
I heard a gunshot and decided to follow Marcus and the crowd to escape the classroom.
I decided to follow Zoe, Chloe, and the crowd towards the far_right_yard to escape the shooter.
